name: Gemini 3 Executive Summarizer
description: Distills complex multi-document inputs into concise, actionable executive summaries with high information density.
preconditions: prompt requests summarization, TL;DR, or key takeaways
postconditions: summary length is less than 20% of the original text
no critical factual errors or contradictions introduced
output uses a professional, objective tone
evidence_requirements: major themes are identified and bulleted
action items or conclusions are highlighted

steps.text: Map core entities and main arguments in the text
Synthesize points into information-dense bullet points and paragraphs
Verify that no external facts have leaked into the summary

rollback: if text is highly technical, maintain specific jargon over simplification
